llm.capability: LLM capability toggles (completion, tools, vision, etc.)
state-tuning.emotion.emotion-retention-h: Old emotion retention ratio for high retention updates
state-tuning.emotion.emotion-retention-m: Old emotion retention ratio for medium retention updates
state-tuning.emotion.emotion-retention-l: Old emotion retention ratio for low retention updates
state-tuning.emotion.mood-retention: Historical mood retention ratio per update
state-tuning.emotion.mood-emotion-influe: Current emotion influence weight on mood
state-tuning.emotion.emotion-half-life-s: Emotion natural decay half-life in seconds
state-tuning.emotion.mood-half-life-seco: Mood natural decay half-life in seconds
state-tuning.flow.min-ratio-of-desire: Minimum flow ratio derived from group desire
state-tuning.flow.min-value-min: Hard lower bound for minimum flow
state-tuning.flow.min-value-max: Hard upper bound for minimum flow
state-tuning.flow.decay-normal-per-minut: Normal flow decay amount per minute
state-tuning.flow.decay-negative-per-min: Negative flow decay amount per minute
state-tuning.flow.core-interest-base-cha: Flow gain for core interest events
state-tuning.flow.continuous-interaction: Flow gain for continuous interaction events
state-tuning.flow.deep-reply-base-charge: Flow gain for deep reply events
state-tuning.flow.group-resonance-base-c: Flow gain for group resonance events
state-tuning.flow.low-activity-penalty: Flow penalty for low group activity
state-tuning.flow.getting-better-thresho: Threshold for the getting-better flow state
state-tuning.flow.burst-threshold: Threshold for the burst flow state
state-tuning.volition.base-desire-defaul: Default group desire when no group value is configured
state-tuning.volition.keyword-hit-max-st: Maximum stimulus from a keyword hit
state-tuning.volition.busy-group-stimulu: Stimulus added when the group is busy
state-tuning.volition.reset-stimulus-amo: Stimulus added by periodic reset or refill
state-tuning.volition.fatigue-decay-low-: Fatigue decay amount in low arousal states
state-tuning.volition.fatigue-decay-norm: Fatigue decay amount in normal states
state-tuning.volition.stimulus-decay-nor: Stimulus decay amount in normal flow states
state-tuning.volition.stimulus-decay-hig: Stimulus decay amount in high flow states
state-tuning.volition.normal-speak-thres: Impulse threshold for speaking in normal flow
state-tuning.volition.high-flow-speak-th: Impulse threshold for speaking in high flow
state-tuning.volition.arousal-impulse-we: Arousal contribution weight in impulse calculation
state-tuning.volition.negative-pleasure-: Negative pleasure penalty weight in impulse calculation
state-tuning.volition.flow-bonus-start: Flow value where impulse bonus starts
state-tuning.volition.flow-bonus-weight: Impulse bonus weight for flow above the bonus start
state-tuning.memory.batch-limit: Maximum messages processed in one memory organization run
state-tuning.memory.min-messages: Minimum pending messages required to trigger memory organization
state-tuning.summary.batch-limit: Maximum messages processed in one summary run
state-tuning.summary.min-messages: Minimum pending messages required to trigger summary
state-tuning.summary.retention-days: Summary state retention period in days
state-tuning.meme.analyze-threshold: Seen count threshold before meme analysis
state-tuning.meme.max-contexts: Maximum contexts kept for each meme
state-tuning.meme.low-heat-seen-threshol: Minimum seen count for low-heat memes to survive cleanup
state-tuning.evolution.default-weight: Initial weight for newly learned words
state-tuning.evolution.active-weight-thr: Minimum weight required for active vocabulary
state-tuning.evolution.stale-days: Days without use before a word is considered stale
state-tuning.evolution.recent-range-hour: Recent message window for vocabulary extraction in hours
state-tuning.evolution.recent-message-li: Maximum recent messages used for vocabulary extraction
state-tuning.evolution.active-limit: Maximum active vocabulary entries returned by default
state-tuning.memory.stale-recall-days: Days before valid facts that were not recalled are deleted
